description: Summarizes confirmed inbound and outbound quantities by product.
purpose: Provides net stock movement per product for inventory dashboards.
fromSql: SELECT p.tinv_pd_code AS product_code, p.tinv_pd_name AS product_name, COALESCE(si.total_in, 0) AS total_in, COALESCE(so.total_out, 0) AS total_out, COALESCE(si.total_in, 0) - COALESCE(so.total_out, 0) AS net_stock FROM mt_tinv_product p LEFT JOIN (SELECT tinv_si_product_id, SUM(tinv_si_quantity) AS total_in FROM mt_tinv_stock_in WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND tinv_si_status = 'confirmed' GROUP BY tinv_si_product_id) si ON p.pid = si.tinv_si_product_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT tinv_so_product_id, SUM(tinv_so_quantity) AS total_out FROM mt_tinv_stock_out WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND tinv_so_status = 'confirmed' GROUP BY tinv_so_product_id) so ON p.pid = so.tinv_so_product_id WHERE p.tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} ORDER BY net_stock DESC
